title: athruphyllum neriifolium
intro: Astruphyllum neriifolium, also known as Brazilian rosemary or rosemary-leaved atraphis, is a shrubby plant native to South America, belonging to the family Melianthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Astruphyllum neriifolium are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Astruphyllum neriifolium is traditionally prepared as a tea or infused oil, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
